page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Sensitive and fast computational tool for detecting circular RNAs (circRNAs) from RNA-Seq data.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: CircMiner is Accurate and Rapid Detection of Circular RNA through Splice-Aware Pseudo-Alignment Scheme. It is a sensitive and fast computational tool for detecting circular RNAs (circRNAs) from RNA-Seq data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CircMiner is Accurate and Rapid Detection of Circular RNA through Splice-Aware Pseudo-Alignment Scheme. It is a sensitive and fast computational tool for detecting circular RNAs (circRNAs) from RNA-Seq data.
